title: carpinus ulmoides
intro: Carpinus ulmoides, also known as Chinese walnut or Li Zhi He, is a deciduous tree native to China, which is often mistakenly classified as a species of the walnut family, but is actually a member of the birch family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Carpinus ulmoides is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
